init_hook: [ "$(uname)" = Darwin ] && { found=; for sdk in /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX*.sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX*.sdk; do [ -d "$sdk" ] && head -10 "$sdk/usr/lib/libSystem.tbd" 2>/dev/null | grep '^targets:' | grep -q ' arm64-macos' && export SDKROOT=$sdk CGO_LDFLAGS="-isysroot $sdk" && found=1 && break; done; [ -z "$found" ] && echo 'WARNING: No macOS SDK with arm64 support found — CGO linking may fail'; } || true
